behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names gradio/utils.py, gradio/cli/commands/skills.py, watchfn, CO_FUTURE_ANNOTATIONS, and lists the specific forward-ref type names (App, Blocks, Component, BlockContext, Request, SessionState, Button) that the test checks.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the symptom (CO_FUTURE_ANNOTATIONS propagating) and the constraint (forward refs must be quoted) without stating 'remove from __future__ import annotations' explicitly; agent must reason about the fix.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavioral properties (no CO_FUTURE_ANNOTATIONS flag on watchfn, annotations resolve, forward refs quoted) rather than specific implementation details, allowing alternative fixes.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests compile code, execute subprocesses, exec user code, and call get_type_hints to verify real behavior, plus run repo pytest suites.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub can't pass test_watchfn_no_future_annotations_flag (requires removing future import) while also keeping test_not_stub (watchfn, BaseReloader, safe_join, >400 lines) and repo reload/type-hint tests passing.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover CO_FUTURE_ANNOTATIONS absence, annotated type resolution, forward refs quoted, and repo lint/reload/type-hint tests — matching the instruction's required behaviors.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass) and tagged with [static]/[pr_diff]/[repo_tests] markers.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a code fix, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers (gradio/utils.py, watchfn, CO_FUTURE_ANNOTATIONS, skills.py) are consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the files to investigate but does not pinpoint the exact buggy line ('from __future__ import annotations'); localization within the file is left to the agent.
